title: IngestProgressEvent v1
description: Streaming progress event emitted by `kebab ingest --json`. One event per line (line-delimited JSON). Discriminated by `kind`. The terminal events are `completed` and `aborted` — every ingest run ends with exactly one of them. The final stdout line of a `--json` ingest is still the existing `ingest_report.v1` for backwards compatibility; progress events stream above it.

ts.description: RFC 3339 timestamp at the moment the event was emitted.

total.description: scan_completed / asset_started / asset_finished: total assets discovered.

idx.description: asset_started / asset_finished: 1-based index of the current asset within the scan.

path.description: asset_started: workspace-relative path of the asset being processed.

chunks.description: asset_finished / asset_chunked / expansion_progress (v0.24.0): chunk count produced for this asset.

done.description: expansion_progress (v0.24.0, additive): chunks processed so far in the per-chunk alias-expansion loop (cache hits included). Throttled: emitted at most every 25 chunks or once per second, plus a final frame where done == chunks.

parse_ms.description: asset_timings (v0.24.0, additive): parse phase wall-clock (ms). Markdown path only.

chunk_ms.description: asset_timings (v0.24.0, additive): chunk phase wall-clock (ms). Markdown path only.

expansion_ms.description: asset_timings (v0.24.0, additive): alias-expansion phase wall-clock (ms). Markdown path only; 0 when expansion is disabled.

embed_ms.description: asset_timings (v0.24.0, additive): embed + vector-upsert phase wall-clock (ms). Markdown path only.

store_ms.description: asset_timings (v0.24.0, additive): SQLite persist phase wall-clock (ms). Markdown path only.

n_chunks.description: embed_batch_started / embed_batch_finished: chunks in this embedding batch.

ms.description: embed_batch_finished / pdf_ocr_finished: wall-clock duration (ms). pdf_ocr_finished skip path 의 의미는 mixed (DCTDecode 부재 시 0, engine 실패 시 latency-before-bail).

chars.description: pdf_ocr_finished: char count of OCR result. Skip 시 0.

page.description: pdf_ocr_started / pdf_ocr_finished: 1-based PDF page number under OCR.

skipped.description: pdf_ocr_finished: true 일 시 OCR 미수행 (DCTDecode 부재 또는 engine 실패). chars=0 만으로는 skip 과 0-char result 구분 불가.

image_byte_size.description: pdf_ocr_finished (optional, v0.20.x): raster image byte size.

image_width.description: pdf_ocr_finished (optional, v0.20.x): raster image width px.

image_height.description: pdf_ocr_finished (optional, v0.20.x): raster image height px.

failure_reason.description: pdf_ocr_finished (optional, v0.20.x): OCR failure reason. Present iff skipped=true due to engine error. Values: timeout | ocr_error | network_error | other.

counts.description: completed / aborted: aggregate counters at the moment the run ended (mirrors fields on `ingest_report.v1`).
